targets.rawSql:
SELECT s.time
     , ROUND(COALESCE(ROUND((SUM(total_space)/1024.0 - SUM(free_space)/1024.0),2) / CASE WHEN ROUND(SUM(total_space)/1024.0,2) = 0 THEN NULL 
                                                                                         ELSE ROUND(SUM(total_space)/1024.0,2)
                                                                                     END, 0) * 100,2) AS use_pct,
     CONCAT(i.instance_name ,' ' ,tablespace_name) as tablespace_name
 FROM lpsis1.ora_tablespace_info s
    , public.apm_db_info i 
WHERE s.db_id = i.db_id 
  AND i.instance_name in ($ServerName)
  AND tablespace_name NOT LIKE '%UNDO%'
  AND tablespace_name NOT LIKE '%TEMP%'
   AND s.partition_key between concat(to_char(to_timestamp($__timeFrom(),'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYMMDD'::text), LPAD(trim(to_char(i.db_id,'9')),3,'0'))::numeric 
                           and concat(to_char(to_timestamp($__timeTo(),'YYYY-MM-DD'), 'YYMMDD'::text), LPAD(trim(to_char(i.db_id,'9')),3,'0'))::numeric
   AND $__timeFilter(s.time)
GROUP BY tablespace_name, s.time ,i.instance_name 
ORDER BY time

list.definition: select instance_name from public.apm_db_info where instance_name not like '%2'
list.name: ServerName
list.query: select instance_name from public.apm_db_info where instance_name not like '%2'
